readings.Aries: You know what you want. The uncertainty is about whether you're allowed to want it. You are. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Taurus: The appetite you're ignoring is not going away. Give it something real. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Gemini: Something you're researching as a way of deciding — enough data exists. Make the call. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Cancer: Your memory holds things gently that others would have dropped. Today that gift is needed. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Leo: You want the room. You also sometimes want to be unknown. Both are real. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Virgo: You've been useful. You've been reliable. Today something needs you to be present rather than productive. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Libra: The beauty you seek in your environment is also something you create in everyone around you. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Scorpio: There is power in what you're not saying. There is also cost. Calculate both. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Sagittarius: Something you've been calling freedom is starting to look like avoidance from a certain angle. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Capricorn: Your patience is a form of power. Today, deploy it on yourself. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Aquarius: Your objectivity is useful and frequently used to distance yourself from feelings. Feel one today. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Pisces: The thing that seems too fragile to name is precisely what needs to be named. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
